commit c5bb5a5fdca0b13230868392f0cbc4c19114dd46
Author: Claude Code <claude@anthropic.com>
Date:   Sat Jun 6 19:55:37 2026 +0800

    feat: Basic Auth for REST API + Web UI login + share password hashing
    
    - Config-stored admin credentials (default admin/admin, SHA-256 hashed)
    - Auth middleware skips /api/health, /, /vue.js, /api/auth/login
    - POST /api/auth/login for Web UI login flow
    - POST /api/auth/password for credential change (persisted to config)
    - CLI --api-user/--api-pass flags with env var support
    - Per-share passwords now SHA-256 hashed in config.json
    - Web UI: login screen, localStorage credential persistence, auto-logout on 401
    - E2E Phase 0: 15 auth tests (login, rejection, password change, restore)
    - 209 unit tests pass, 0 clippy warnings
